nasb.text: And he said to them, “Men of Israel, take care what you propose to do with these men.

esv.text: And he said to them, “Men of Israel, take care what you are about to do with these men.

cnv.text: 然後對大家說：“以色列人哪，你們應當小心處理這些人！

ccb.text: 然后说：“以色列人啊，你们应当慎重处置这些人。

csbs.text: 就对大家说：“各位以色列人哪，如何处置这些人，你们应当谨慎。
